channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [SEVL] Supertech Ev Ltd Closes Trading Window Until 48 Hours After FY2025-26 Audited Financial Statement Announcement
item.description:
Supertech Ev Ltd has announced the closure of its trading window for dealing in securities, effective from April 01, 2026. The closure is in accordance with the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015 and the company's Code of Conduct. The trading window will reopen 48 hours after the announcement of the audited financial results for the financial year ending on March 31, 2026. The board meeting to approve the audited financial results will be announced in due course. The information is also available on the company's website.

  • Trading window closure from April 01, 2026
  • Reopening of trading window 48 hours after FY2025-26 audited financial results announcement
  • Closure in accordance with SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015
  • Board meeting to approve audited financial results to be announced in due course
  • Information available on the company's website

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Supertech Ev Ltd | Category: Monthly Update

item.title: [MONARCH] Monarch Networth Capital Acquires 05% Stake in Monarch Infrapark Under SEBI Regulations
item.description:
Monarch Networth Capital Ltd has acquired a 05% stake in Monarch Infrapark Pvt Ltd as per the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations 2011. The acquisition was made through shares carrying voting rights. The total equity share capital of the target company (TC) before the acquisition was 7,92,68,338 shares, which increased to 7,92,68,338 shares after the acquisition. The total diluted share/voting capital of the TC after the acquisition is also 7,92,68,338 shares.

  • Monarch Networth Capital acquires 05% stake in Monarch Infrapark
  • Acquisition made under SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations 2011
  • Acquisition made through shares carrying voting rights
  • Total equity share capital of the TC before and after the acquisition remains the same
  • Total diluted share/voting capital of the TC after the acquisition is 7,92,68,338 shares

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Monarch Networth Capital Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [VASWANI] Vaswani Industries Ltd Announces Closure of Trading Window for Q1 2026
item.description:
Vaswani Industries Ltd has announced the closure of its trading window for the quarter and financial year ending 31st March 2026. The closure will come into effect from 1st April 2026 and will reopen after 48 hours from the dissemination of the audited financial results. The decision is in accordance with the Company’s Code for Regulating, Monitoring and Reporting Trading by Insiders and the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015. The trading window will remain closed for promoters, promoter group, directors, key managerial personnel, and all other designated persons, their immediate relatives, and specified connected persons. The date for the board meeting to consider the audited financial results will be communicated in due course.

  • Trading window closure for Q1 2026
  • Closure in accordance with the Company’s Code and SEBI regulations
  • Closure for promoters, promoter group, directors, KMPs, and designated persons
  • Reopening after 48 hours from audited financial results dissemination
  • Board meeting date for financial results consideration to be communicated later

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: VASWANI INDUSTRIES LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [AHMDSTE] Ahmedabad Steelcraft Ltd Closes Trading Window for Q1 2026
item.description:
Ahmedabad Steelcraft Ltd has announced the closure of its trading window for the quarter ended on March 31, 2026. The closure is in accordance with the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015, and the company's 'Code of Internal Procedures and Conduct for Regulating, Monitoring and Reporting of Trading in Securities by Designated Persons'. The trading window will remain closed until 48 hours after the declaration of the audited financial results for the quarter and year ended on March 31, 2026. The date of the board meeting for publishing the audited financial results will be announced in due course.

  • Trading window closure for Q1 2026
  • In accordance with SEBI regulations and the company's insider trading code
  • Closure until 48 hours after the declaration of audited financial results
  • Board meeting date for publishing results to be announced later

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: AHMEDABAD STEELCRAFT LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [HIGHENE] High Energy Batteries India Ltd: Mrs. Lalitha Lakshmanan to Step Down as Independent Director, Mrs. Jayashree Ajit Shankar to Join the Board
item.description:
High Energy Batteries India Ltd has announced that Mrs. Lalitha Lakshmanan will cease to be an Independent Director of the company effective from 31st March 2026, upon completion of her two terms. The company has also announced the appointment of Mrs. Jayashree Ajit Shankar as a Woman Independent Director for a first term of five years from 01st April 2026.

  • Mrs. Lalitha Lakshmanan to step down as Independent Director of High Energy Batteries India Ltd after completion of her two terms.
  • Mrs. Jayashree Ajit Shankar to join the Board as Woman Independent Director for a first term of five years from 01st April 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: HIGH ENERGY BATTERIES (INDIA) LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [AMANTA] Bandhan Mutual Fund Acquires 0.0556% Stake in Amanta Healthcare Ltd, Increasing Holding to 5.0124%
item.description:
Bandhan Mutual Fund, through its scheme Bandhan Small Cap Fund, has acquired equity shares of Amanta Healthcare Limited on March 25, 2026, resulting in an increased holding of 5.0124% of the paid-up capital/voting rights of the company. This acquisition is in accordance with Regulation 29(1) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeover) Regulations, 2011.

  • Bandhan Mutual Fund acquired 0.0556% of Amanta Healthcare Ltd shares on March 25, 2026.
  • The acquisition increased Bandhan Mutual Fund's holding to 5.0124% of Amanta Healthcare Ltd's paid-up capital/voting rights.
  • The acquisition was made through the Bandhan Small Cap Fund scheme.
  • The transaction is in compliance with Regulation 29(1) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeover) Regulations, 2011.
  • Bandhan AMC Limited, the investment manager of Bandhan Mutual Fund, provided the necessary disclosures to the stock exchange.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Amanta Healthcare Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [HIGHENE] High Energy Batteries India Ltd Reconstitutes Various Committees of the Board
item.description:
High Energy Batteries India Ltd has reconstituted its Audit Committee, Nomination and Remuneration Committee, Stakeholders Relationship Committee, and Corporate Social Responsibility Committee with effect from 1st April 2026. The reconstitution follows the approval in the Board Meeting held on 28th March 2026. The new committee members include Dr. R Subrahmaniya Sivam, Cmde. Saroj Kumar Patel, Mrs. Jayashree Ajit Shankar, Mr. C V Ramana, and Dr. Vijayamohanan K Pillai.

  • High Energy Batteries India Ltd reconstitutes various committees of the Board.
  • The reconstitution is effective from 1st April 2026.
  • The new committee members include Dr. R Subrahmaniya Sivam, Cmde. Saroj Kumar Patel, Mrs. Jayashree Ajit Shankar, Mr. C V Ramana, and Dr. Vijayamohanan K Pillai.
  • The reconstitution follows the approval in the Board Meeting held on 28th March 2026.
  • The committees reconstituted are Audit Committee, Nomination and Remuneration Committee, Stakeholders Relationship Committee, and Corporate Social Responsibility Committee.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: HIGH ENERGY BATTERIES (INDIA) LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [WARDINMOBI] Promoter Yatin Sanjay Gupte Creates Pledge on Shares of Wardwizard Innovations & Mobility Ltd
item.description:
Wardwizard Innovations & Mobility Ltd has received a disclosure under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011 from its promoter, Yatin Sanjay Gupte. The disclosure pertains to the creation of a pledge on the shares of the company by the promoter. The pledge has been created in favor of Comfort Fincap Limited and Comfort Securities Limited, and it secures the shortfall in the Margin call as per the terms and conditions agreed between the parties. The pledge is for 10,00,000 equity shares, which is 0.33% of the total share capital.

  • Wardwizard Innovations & Mobility Ltd promoter Yatin Sanjay Gupte creates a pledge on the company's shares.
  • The pledge is in favor of Comfort Fincap Limited and Comfort Securities Limited.
  • The pledge secures the shortfall in the Margin call as per the terms and conditions agreed between the parties.
  • 10,00,000 equity shares are pledged, which is 0.33% of the total share capital.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Wardwizard Innovations & Mobility Ltd | Category: Pledge

item.title: [SNIM] Trading Window Closure Announced by Svarnim Trade Udyog Ltd
item.description:
Svarnim Trade Udyog Ltd has announced the closure of the trading window for purchasing, selling, or dealing in the company's equity shares. The closure is in accordance with Clause 4 of Schedule B of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015, and the company's Code of Practices, Procedure and Conduct. The trading window will be closed for all Directors, Promoters, Designated Persons, and Insiders from Wednesday, 1st April, 2026, until 48 hours after the declaration and publication of Audited Financial Results for the Quarter and Year ended on 31st March, 2026.

  • Svarnim Trade Udyog Ltd announces closure of trading window
  • Closure in accordance with Securities and Exchange Board of India regulations
  • Trading window to close for Directors, Promoters, Designated Persons, and Insiders
  • Closure effective from Wednesday, 1st April, 2026
  • Trading to resume 48 hours after declaration and publication of Audited Financial Results for the Quarter and Year ended on 31st March, 2026

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Svarnim Trade Udyog Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [FAZE3Q] Ajay Anand Acquires Major Stake in Faze Three Ltd Through Open Market
item.description:
🔥 Trending

According to a disclosure made under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011, Ajay Anand and Persons Acting in Concert (PAC) have acquired a significant stake in Faze Three Limited. The acquisition was made through the purchase of equity shares from the open market. The total holding of Ajay Anand and PAC before the acquisition was 34.78%, which increased to 57.95% post-acquisition. The total equity share capital of the company remains the same at Rs. 24,31,90,000/- (2,43,19,000 Equity Shares of Face Value of Rs 10/- Each) before and after the acquisition.

  • Ajay Anand and PAC acquire significant stake in Faze Three Limited
  • Acquisition made through purchase from open market
  • Pre-acquisition holding was 34.78%, post-acquisition holding is 57.95%
  • Total equity share capital of the company remains the same
  • Transaction valued at Rs. 24,31,90,000/-

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: FAZE THREE LTD.-$ | Category: Acquisitions
